# Rules Reference

## Static Rules

Evaluated against your Collector YAML configuration.

| ID | Severity | Description |
| -- | -------- | ----------- |
| `missing-memory-limiter` | critical | Pipeline has no memory_limiter processor |
| `missing-batch` | warning | Pipeline has no batch processor |
| `no-trace-sampling` | warning | Traces pipeline has no sampling processor |
| `unused-components` | info | Component defined but not used in any pipeline |
| `multiple-exporters-no-routing` | info | Multiple exporters without a routing processor |
| `no-log-severity-filter` | info | Logs pipeline has no severity filtering |
| `memory-limiter-not-first` | critical | memory_limiter is not the first processor in the pipeline |
| `batch-before-sampling` | critical | Batch processor runs before a sampling processor |
| `batch-not-near-end` | info | Batch processor is not near the end of the pipeline |
| `receiver-endpoint-wildcard` | warning | Receiver binds to 0.0.0.0 wildcard address |
| `debug-exporter-in-pipeline` | warning | Debug or logging exporter present in pipeline |
| `pprof-extension-enabled` | info | pprof extension is enabled |
| `memory-limiter-without-limits` | critical | memory_limiter has no limit_mib or limit_percentage configured |
| `exporter-no-sending-queue` | warning | Network exporter has no sending queue configured |
| `exporter-no-retry` | warning | Exporter has no retry_on_failure configured |
| `undefined-component-ref` | critical | Pipeline references an undefined component |
| `empty-pipeline` | critical | Pipeline has no receivers or exporters |
| `filter-error-mode-propagate` | warning | Filter or transform processor uses error_mode propagate |
| `scrape-interval-mismatch` | warning | Receivers in the same metrics pipeline use different scrape intervals |
| `exporter-insecure-tls` | critical | Exporter has TLS verification disabled |
| `no-health-check-extension` | warning | Configuration has no health_check extension |
| `exporter-endpoint-localhost` | info | Network exporter points to a localhost endpoint |
| `exporter-no-compression` | info | OTLP exporter has no compression configured |
| `tail-sampling-without-memory-limiter` | warning | tail_sampling processor without memory_limiter in traces pipeline |
| `connector-loop` | critical | Connectors form a pipeline cycle causing infinite data circulation |
| `no-health-check-trace-filter` | info | Traces pipeline has no filter dropping health check spans |
| `filesystem-scraper-no-exclusions` | info | Filesystem scraper has no virtual filesystem exclusions |
| `short-scrape-interval` | info | Receiver uses a sub-minute scrape or collection interval |
| `exporter-timeout-too-low` | info | OTLP exporter timeout is below 10 seconds |
| `sending-queue-too-small` | info | Exporter sending queue is explicitly set below 500 |
| `no-span-metrics-connector` | info | Traces and metrics pipelines exist but no spanmetrics connector is configured |
| `extension-endpoint-exposed` | warning | Admin extension endpoint is bound to a wildcard address |
| `debug-log-feedback-loop` | critical | Debug exporter in logs pipeline risks infinite feedback via log collection |

## Live Rules

Evaluated in real time against Prometheus metrics scraped from a running Collector.

| ID | Severity | Description |
| -- | -------- | ----------- |
| `live-high-drop-rate` | warning | Sustained drop rate above 10% on any signal |
| `live-log-volume-dominance` | info | Log ingest rate exceeds 3x trace ingest rate |
| `live-queue-near-capacity` | warning | Exporter queue utilization exceeds 80% |
| `live-receiver-exporter-mismatch` | warning | Receiver accepted rate exceeds 2x exporter sent rate |
| `live-exporter-sustained-failures` | critical | Exporter is experiencing sustained send failures |
| `live-receiver-backpressure` | warning | Receiver accepted rate dropped sharply, indicating backpressure |
| `live-zero-throughput` | warning | No data flowing through any receiver for multiple intervals |

## Catalog Rules

Evaluated against metrics discovered through the OTLP sampling tap.

| ID | Severity | Description |
| -- | -------- | ----------- |
| `catalog-internal-metrics-not-filtered` | warning | Internal otelcol_* metrics are exported without filtering |
| `catalog-high-attribute-count` | warning | Metric has more than 10 attribute keys |
| `catalog-point-count-outlier` | warning | Metric point count is a statistical outlier |
| `catalog-filter-keeps-everything` | info | Filter processor matches no metrics for dropping |
| `catalog-filter-drops-everything` | critical | Filter processor drops all observed metrics |
| `catalog-no-filter-high-volume` | info | More than 50 metrics exported without a filter processor |
| `catalog-many-histograms` | info | Histogram metrics dominate the metric stream |
| `catalog-loop-device-metrics` | info | Loop device entries present in system.disk metrics |

## Alert Coverage

Evaluates Prometheus alerting rules against your Collector config to detect alerts that reference metrics your pipelines would drop or fail to deliver. See [ADR-0018](adr/0018-alert-rule-coverage-analysis.md) for details.
